visualization.title: Total Scholarship Amount by Scholarship Type

resultRaw.sql: SELECT scholarship_type AS scholarship_type, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM public.scholarships GROUP BY scholarship_type ORDER BY total_amount DESC, scholarship_type ASC;

issues: All encoded fields (scholarship_type, total_amount) appear in metadata.columns — OK.
The chart encodes the GROUP BY (scholarship_type) on the categorical axis and the SUM(amount) as the quantitative axis — aggregation/grouping is reflected correctly.

The Vega-Lite encoding sorts by total_amount descending, matching the SQL ORDER BY total_amount DESC; however the SQL also specifies a secondary ORDER BY scholarship_type ASC for ties which is not explicitly represented in the Vega-Lite sort (minor: may affect tie ordering).
Color is mapped to scholarship_type and the legend is suppressed; this is redundant with the x-axis categories but not incorrect (presentation choice).
metadata.rowCount is 3 but the provided sample contains only 2 rows — possible metadata/sample mismatch (data-quality warning).

result.sql: SELECT scholarship_type AS scholarship_type, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM public.scholarships GROUP BY scholarship_type ORDER BY total_amount DESC, scholarship_type ASC;

issues: All encoded fields (scholarship_type, total_amount) appear in metadata.columns — OK.
The chart encodes the GROUP BY (scholarship_type) on the categorical axis and the SUM(amount) as the quantitative axis — aggregation/grouping is reflected correctly.

The Vega-Lite encoding sorts by total_amount descending, matching the SQL ORDER BY total_amount DESC; however the SQL also specifies a secondary ORDER BY scholarship_type ASC for ties which is not explicitly represented in the Vega-Lite sort (minor: may affect tie ordering).
Color is mapped to scholarship_type and the legend is suppressed; this is redundant with the x-axis categories but not incorrect (presentation choice).
